title: Vanilla+ Expansion
description: This mod adds a few features using vanilla blocks, items, and mobs including structures like an illusioner castle, a variant oak, and new recipes.
body:
This mod aims to add more variety, quality of life features, and structures to the game with vanilla block, items, and mobs. It adds several new recipes for some vanilla blocks and items like spawners and certain mob eggs. The mod gives forests an overahaul with a new tall tree variant and adds new structures including the Illusioner Castle, Skeletal Tower and Illager Apartments. This castle is full of trial spawners and loot. Rare items like mob heads and music discs are obtainable there.

Rare mobs like the illusioner and zombie horses can also be found in the structure. Meanwhile, the Illager Apartments house both villagers and illagers of a variety of types. They gaurd a variety of loot including coral blocks. Additionally, new crafting recipes for spawners, trial spawners, vaults, infested blocks and several spawn eggs are now available. You can unlock the recipes for the blocks by obtaining a beacon. As for the eggs, you must obtain a ghast tear to unlock those recipes. Same goes for infested blocks.

**This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

**Major Structures:**

**Illusioner Castle** found in Plains biomes
![Illusioner Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5400744df7a041f032fde042695315ba7f7586e6.png)

**Illager Apartments** found in Snowy Plains biomes
![Illager Apartments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43a53436d2e7c92049132b94a2fdb540eed5ad81.png)

**Grand Desert Temple** found in Desert biomes
![Grand Desert Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd4e6cc6c0b0adc13d818f31bac3896fd26ee5d_0.webp)

**Rabbit Castle** found in Tiaga biomes
![Rabbit Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2c80b36a1c6305710d5232bfba6536bac55517.png)

**White Castle** found in Swamp biomes
![White Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa93899be989548ab207f630e4c62f4050d84b84.jpeg)

**Skeletal Tower** found in Savannah biomes
![Skeletal Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0e80feed63a665dab4ea0ad4be3da15a84abfc_0.webp)

**Brick Cathedral** found in Forest biomes
![Brick Cathedral](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7f38afecc30f3d3b2e8427ea3c805b96f3fc75.jpeg)

**Other Structures:**

-Villager Dome
![Villager Dome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2447674d925104bd9eccfd96fc42f4c5bb29e65.jpeg)

-Villager Lighthouse
![Villager Lighthouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59951734c56a125dc9c03cd780aeda8cbf290228.jpeg)

-Frozen Tower
![Frozen Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9047078be98f9b78bcaefeb7795e6fd6dbc8c239.png)

-Spruce Tavern
![Spruce Tavern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/045de1d5d4d58505165b45842afdad2f73b07c73.png)

-Abandoned Train
![Abandoned Train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2accfd03b4a979688adb4ac322780a2d2d1311af.png)

-Plains Tavern
![Plains Tavern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359b7c13ea397c2f0b2d86b92abe2a87e8def316.png)

**Terrain Features:**

-Forest Oak Trees

-Flower Forest Oak Trees

-Birch Forest Oak Trees

-Giant Spruce Trees

-Giant Spruce Trunks

-Giant Jack O Lanterns

-Swamp Mushrooms (Bedrock Parity)

-Dead Oak Trees

-Dying Oak Trees (Bedrock Parity)

**Mob Overhauls:**

-Pets immune to damage from owner unless crouching

-Pets not sitting can now teleport to player from anywhere in the world (chunks with non sitting pets stay loaded)

-Pets will mount and dismount boats automatically with their player
